faqs.question: Is the BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus the same for all colleges?
faqs.answer: The BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus is not the same across all colleges, as every college committee sets a particular coursework pattern at the start of every academic year to be followed for the respective batch. The syllabus includes some core subjects, interesting electives, and lab work that gives detailed knowledge to the students about the workings of the field.

faqs.question: What is covered in Machine Design subject in B.Tech course?
faqs.answer:
Dear candidate, the subject of Machine Design basically teaches you about the designing fundamentals of various types of machinery across industries. You get to learn about the different ways in which elements can be combined to form an equipment or machine system and get the work done in an effective manner.
The knowledge of this subject is very important for a mechanical engineer as he/she will have to put this to use in the future whenever they enter the workforce as a mechanical engineering professional.
Hope this cleared your doubt. Have a good day.

faqs.question: Is there enough demand for BTech graduates in the job market?
faqs.answer:
If we look at the market demand, no doubt there is huge demand for BTech (Full Form: Bachelor of Technology) graduates among top recruiters who are constantly looking for skilled and knowledgeable students with fresh ideas to enhance their business growth and profitability.
Having said that, a few previous-year employment reports published by the Business Standard and Times of India suggest that students found it a struggle to land a high-paying job after completing BTech because of a lack of industry-specific skills and knowledge and cut-throat competition between Lacs of engineering students hunting for a job.
Hence, it is very important for students to focus on enhancing their skill set according to industrial demands and technological advancements, stay updated regarding all industry trends, build good networks and, most importantly, take up internships to gain experience and stand out in front of the employer.
Read more: B Tech Jobs in India

faqs.question: Which industries hire students with a BTech CSE qualification?
faqs.answer:
Graduates with a BTech degree in CSE are in high demand across a plethora of work fields, as everything is ruled by computer technology these days and every industry needs strong software applications, network security, and database management systems for effective working. A few top industries recruiting BTech in CSE graduates are given here:
IT & Software
Product Development
E-Commerce and Digital Commerce
Cloud Computing & AI
Data Science & Analytics
Banking and FinTech
Automotive
Healthcare
Useful Link: BTech CSE Career Scope

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Review of IETDAVV Indore on the basis of placement, faculty, and infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Placements at IETDAVVR are a major strength, particularly for the Computer Science, Information Technology, and Electronics and Telecom branches, where the placement percentage exceeds 90% for CS/IT. The place scenario is less for branches, life, Civil mechanical engineering, the college has been impressive, the highest Bag From 22. LPA to 56. LPA. Notable recruiters include major companies like TCS Infosys, Wipro, and many others, indicating a healthy mix of product-based and base companies visiting the campus. Training and placement are reported to be very dedicated and supported.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with this college, its decent, and you can get placement if you work a bit.

review_content.Placements: Placements are decent, but you really need to work hard on your own skills. Some good companies do visit the campus, and opportunities are there if you prepare well. Overall, placement support is okay, but not extraordinary. So if you do not get placed, you cannot blame the college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostels are decent, but seats are limited, so getting a room can be tough. For the first year of B.Tech, the chemistry lab is available, and other labs lack many instruments. Infrastructure is improving, but still needs development. For example, there is no lab for applied chemistry for sem 1.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electronics and Instrumentation Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Institute of engineering and technology.

review_content.Placements: Almost 90% of students get placed overall in college. The highest offered package is around 1.2 crore, and the average package varies around 7 LPA. Top recruiting companies include big names like ZS, Volvo, Eicher, etc. The top roles offered in the college are Mechanical, Civil, Electrical & Instrumentation, and Computer Science and IT.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities in the college are not very good. The college lacks basic amenities like a good canteen and mess facility, which are necessities. The hostel is also very average. The cleanliness is good, but the condition of the classrooms is average. The library is good. The food in the mess is average, and there are no medical facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Take this college only if you get CS/IT.

review_content.Placements: The highest package was 31 LPA for 2023 batch and average was 8 LPA. The placement was decent and good number of companies visited the campus. Almost 90% students got placed in CS/IT, the placements are decent for Electronics and telecommunication and Electronics and Instrumentation. There is almost zero placement for Civil and Mechanical branch. From this year onwards, new branch Computer Science with business analytics is added into college. Z associate, NRI fintech, Z scale, VM Aware, TCS, Delloite, Credit Susie, Deutsche bank were main companies which came for recruitments.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Try to avoid taking an admission in IET DAVV.

review_content.Placements: The average package offered in this course is around 6.7–7.5 Lacs, with around 96% of students getting placed (I got this data from the orientation program, which was held on the 2nd day of college). CS/IT-Branch-Students get more placement offers. In 2021-22, the highest package was above 40 Lacs, and in the year 2022-23, the highest package was about 22 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus has one of the worst infrastructures you can find in a college. It doesn't even provide basic things like a working fan. The chairs and benches are in very bad condition, the walls seem like they're from around 2 decades old. The college didn't get renovated. Washrooms don't have water, with water coolers in a very bad condition. There is a library, which has zero books. You can only get the syllabus-books. There is Wi-Fi with 1 Kbps speed. The canteen is very small and it doesn't have availability of snacks. There is no playground in the campus. They don't even have a single chessboard.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electronics and Instrumentation Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: An honest review by a student of IET DAVV.

review_content.Placements: At IET DAVV, the average yearly placement is approximately 60 to 70 percent, with the highest package being 28 LPA and an average package of 5 LPA. Companies like NRI Fintech, Deutsche Bank, ZS Associates, and many others visit the college. Around 40 to 50 percent of students secure internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is good, with each department having its own building, labs, workshops, library, and incubation center. Wi-Fi is available on campus and in the hostel. The hostel rooms are double occupancy, and the mess, which serves average food, is located near the hostel. Hostel seats are limited, and the sports facilities are lacking, with no big ground on campus; students have to go to the university for sports.

reviews.review_heading: IET-DAVV, a college to go for or not?
reviews.review_text: Institute of Engineering and Technology offers various facilities for the students including hostels, libraries, IT center, and incubation center. The hostel is average, not that good, and the mess too. Davv also has a gymnasium and outdoor sports facilities for students.

reviews.review_heading: Having good times with new friends.
reviews.review_text: The college does not have any well-maintained medical facilities, but there is one old library and one new library at the incubation centre, which has a separate hall for study where there are desks with charging ports. On campus, there are separate buildings for each department, like the F and E blocks.

reviews.review_heading: IET DAVV- The college review.
reviews.review_text:
The hostel facilities are average. Not that good but reasonable and affordable to the lower-income class. Mess food is below average in the IET DAVV.
Most of the students prefer outside tiffin and canteen facilities.
Overall, the hostel and mess are on campus, which reduces travel for students.

reviews.review_heading: The college faculty is very nice and also good facilities are provided by IET DAVV.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available in my college are good; we have Wi-Fi in every building, classrooms are also clean and the library provides all books with good qualities. The mess food is not very good and all types of sports were provided at my university.

reviews.review_heading: Best state government college .
reviews.review_text: Buildings are kind of old and hostel rooms are a little too small and gloomy. Although their are many blocks for different branches that are kind of new,. The college also has labs such as a combustion lab and mechanical workshop, as well as an incubation centre (which is only used as the new library).

reviews.review_heading: IET DAVV - short review .
reviews.review_text: The hostel is okay, but the building is a bit old. There is okay Wi-Fi connectivity, which helps a lot. Hostels have a 100–150 Mbps speed in general through LAN and about 50 Mbps through Wi-Fi. The labs have all the equipment needed but they are a bit old.

reviews.review_heading: IET-DAVV - You should go for it or not?
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure for the hostel is average the rooms are average not luxury you can live in them but if you can afford hostels outside you should go for them. The canteen doesn't have much options and the mess food is really trash. The college buildings are old build up and needs renovation. The classrooms have a projector and pcs which is a plus point.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college because of its placements.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are good. The hostel rooms are small. They are not good. The hostel fee is Rs. 22,000 per semester. The Wi-Fi facility is good. The hostel has water problem. Washrooms are not much clean.

highlights.summary: A few more updates are given below:

faqs.answer:
A:    Udaya School Of Engineering has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu.
Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate.
Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply.
Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced.
Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile.
Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed Bachelor's degree of minimum 3 years duration with minimum 50% (45 % for reserved category).
The qualifying degree examination can be 10+2+3/4/5 years pattern or 10+3 years Diploma +3 years pattern or B.E./B.Tech./B.Arch./B.Pharm. or 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE.
AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time e

answer.text: Udaya School Of Engineering has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu. Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate. Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply. Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced. Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile. Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed Bachelor's degree of minimum 3 years duration with minimum 50% (45 % for reserved category). The qualifying degree examination can be 10+2+3/4/5 years pattern or 10+3 years Diploma +3 years pattern or B.E./B.Tech./B.Arch./B.Pharm. or 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE. AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field. Candidates admitted through Lateral Entry in degree courses are not eligible. Candidates with degree obtained without studying 10th/12th Std. or 3 years degree programme are not eligible. Candidates appearing for the final semester/year are also eligible.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have completed B.E./B.Tech. in Biomedical Engg./Medical Electronics/Electronics and Communication Engg/Electronics and Instrumentation Engineering./Bioengineering. Candidate belonging to reserved category must have 45% in qualifying examination. Candidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible. AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field. Candidates with B.E./B.Tech. degrees obtained through Distance/Weekend mode are not eligible. Candidates with degree obtained without studying 10th/12th Std. or 3 years degree programme are not eligible. Candidates appearing for the final semester/year are also eligible.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: A college is run with the blessings of Pooja Guru Dr. Nirmalananda Swamiji.

content.Placements: I have chosen CSE in engineering. I am happy with my choice in this college and I am working with all of the guidance given by my faculty members. Placements have been conducted for the past 3 years. We have no batch yet which is passed out with placements but they conduct functions and interviews and also meetings with all companies. It makes sure we have better experience in internships.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure and hostel infrastructure are really good. It maintains discipline overall on the campus and also in the hostel corridors. We have security and one caretaker in our hostel. The food in the hostel is very good and nutritious.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied with faculty and good placements.

content.Placements: College started in 2022 which means we are the first batch of this college. They are saying they provide 100% of placements many of the job roles are software developer, project manager, etc. Students who get internships are fewer students getting from other fake websites and have no proper guidance.
content.Infrastructure: There is no boys hostel in the college. They put the hostel boys somewhere in Vijaynagar Mutt that hostel is the worst for all the others who come to Bangalore for survival stay. There are fewer costs but the girl's hostel is good. They have more than enough facilities and quality of food is good and they are not taking care about boys.

individual_reviews.title: Disappointed with infrastructure, but great faculty.

paragraphs: BGS College of Engineering and Technology admission 2025is currently open. The college offers BE and MBA courses at the UG and PG level. To be admitted to theBGS College of Engineering and Technology, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the college. The college is affiliated withVisvesvaraya Technological University. The application process at the BGSCE is conducted online. Read the following article to know more about theBGS College of Engineering and Technologycourse admission2025.

BGSCE courses' admission is based on entrance exam scores. Along with that, candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements for the respective courses. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection forBGS College of Engineering and Technology courses:
Course Name
Eligibility
Selection Criteria
BGS College of Engineering and Technology admission process includes registration and application form evaluation. Candidates must follow the below steps to get a seat in BGSCE:
STEP 1: BGS College of Engineering and Technology Application Process 2025
Candidates are required to apply online on the official website of the institute. Students can also check the detailedBGS College of Engineering and Technology feestructure here.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds
Students will be selected based on KCET, JEE Main, COMED-K for the BE course and PGCET, KMAT for the MBA course.
STEP 3: Merit List andAdmission Confirmation
Once selection rounds are over, the institute releases a merit list. To allot and confirm the seat candidates are required to pay the application fee at the admission receipt centre.

hostel_campus.college_name: BGS College of Engineering and Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: A college is run with the blessings of Pooja Guru Dr. Nirmalananda Swamiji.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure and hostel infrastructure are really good. It maintains discipline overall on the campus and also in the hostel corridors. We have security and one caretaker in our hostel. The food in the hostel is very good and nutritious.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with faculty and good placements.
reviews.review_text: There is no boys hostel in the college. They put the hostel boys somewhere in Vijaynagar Mutt that hostel is the worst for all the others who come to Bangalore for survival stay. There are fewer costs but the girl's hostel is good. They have more than enough facilities and quality of food is good and they are not taking care about boys.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with my college.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facility was amazing and we had air conditioner rooms thata well-maintained. Food quality was also good, with options for both veg and non-veg. There were lots of canteens and food courts. Medical facilities were also good, they took care of us very well. We also had lots of opportunities to play games and sports.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure .
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good separate labs for separate department every department has its own digital class high class auditorium. We can access Wi-Fi all around the college. Separate teacher for mentoring and full building with CCTV coverage. We can safe here.

reviews.review_heading: Disappointed with infrastructure, but great faculty.
reviews.review_text: Each branch has each floor provided with well-equipped labs and digital classrooms and normal classrooms. The quality of food provided in the canteen is good and healthy for students to eat, and the price is also reasonable. We have a sports and games department; our college encourages sports students.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: This college provides training for placements and teachers are supportive.

content.Placements: It is a good college. Almost 85% of students are placed. The highest salary package offered is 12 LPA and the lowest salary package offered is 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies like TCS, Infosys, etc., visit our campus. Almost 95% of students get internships.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides all facilities. Lab facilities are good. Our classrooms are excellent. Smart classrooms and Wi-Fi are available. Our college gives importance to sports. The hostel facilities are good. The quality of the food is good. Purified drinking water is provided.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Our college is very good in placements and academics.

content.Placements: Around 90% of students are placed. The highest salary package offered is 10 LPA. The top recruiting companies are TCS and CTS. All students get internships training. Our college help students to develop their skills.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good, and Wi-Fi is installed on campus. The classrooms are good, and the library is very peaceful. The hostel is also very good. Our college is good for extra sports training as well.
content.Faculty: Teachers are helpful, and they make students understand what they teach. They are well-qualified. The course is purely related to curriculum, and they train everyone for the industry. The semester exams are like understanding and writing. If students cannot understand, then they cannot write it properly.

content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library are available. There is the biggest playground. There is a wonderful food court. There are more than 150 hostel students who get good and healthy food.
content.Faculty: Faculty hold doctorate and good in teaching. The course makes students for industry-ready. Semester exams are quite easy. The pass percentage is 70-80% but in semester above 90%.

individual_reviews.title: It is a beautiful campus with a useful social mission and vision for the betterment of students.

College of Engineering and Technology (PACET) was B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering, with a cutoff rank of 71549.

reviews.review_heading: This college provides training for placements and teachers are supportive.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides all facilities. Lab facilities are good. Our classrooms are excellent. Smart classrooms and Wi-Fi are available. Our college gives importance to sports. The hostel facilities are good. The quality of the food is good. Purified drinking water is provided.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good in placements and academics.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, and Wi-Fi is installed on campus. The classrooms are good, and the library is very peaceful. The hostel is also very good. Our college is good for extra sports training as well.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good with wonderful infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library are available. There is the biggest playground. There is a wonderful food court. There are more than 150 hostel students who get good and healthy food.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with great infrastructure and good facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a very good infrastructure and a has a peaceful environment. There is a well-connected internet connection, and most of the journals and books, and IEEE journals are also available. There is a separate hostel facility for girls and boys with a good mess.

reviews.review_heading: It is a beautiful campus with a useful social mission and vision for the betterment of students.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a very good infrastructure. The library IS very big and HAS a large number of books. The entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled, but the internet speed is not that fast. The college hostel is very neat, and the dining hall is much larger than other colleges.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied and really I suggest this college to students.
reviews.review_text:
College has a good infrastructure and very best facilities, it has a peaceful environment to study and learn things
College has good Wi-Fi facilities and also has lab facilities to learn the theory practically
Hostel facility is available, canteen food is average.

reviews.review_heading: An enjoyable college experience, but there are no placements.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is available in the college. The laboratories are well-maintained and equipped. Classrooms have basic facilities, and the canteen serves all varieties of food from fast food to traditional meals. A general store is also available inside the campus. One bank and two ATMs are also available on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the way of ruling the college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi will be in off upto 5 o clock! I think it is not necessary! Labs and classrooms will be good. Sports and games are good enough. Labs will contain all equipments and will be in good condition. They also will be in cleaned condition. Library is available for whole college and also separate library provided for all departments. The medical facilities are only first aid, there are no other medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied faculty, average placement in 2015, but good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college has all type of lab facilities, no lag on that. The management entertains all indoor and outdoor door games. The food is ordered on the contract bases, and the quality of food is worth for money. The hostel rooms are not bad, but okay. The hostel rooms are small, simple and good. The food provided in hostels is not good. There are no complaints. The infrastructure of the college is awesome you get all the amenities on the premises.

reviews.review_heading: P.A.college of engineering and technology review.
reviews.review_text: The main block of the college has a significant attraction. Wi-Fi and the library were good. Not a very good atmosphere if you need to excel in the sports. The quality of the labs, classrooms and the food offered in the canteen are average. The hostel rooms are just okay. The ventilation in the labs and the classrooms have to be improved (it would be better if air-conditioners are provided in these rooms). Still, they use old design software in design labs which have to be updated.

My college was located at a very good location. The education is good in the college but the teaching method needs to be improved and good books need to be provided here. The placements are not up to the mark and good companies are not coming for the recruitments. The mechanical department is good in the college with good laboratories and staff members' culture, but the placements need to be improved in the mechanical stream. My college was located at a very good location. The education is good in the college but the teaching method needs to be improved and good books need to be provided here. The placements are not up to the mark and good companies are not coming for the recruitments. The mechanical department is good in the college with good laboratories and staff members' culture, but the placements need to be improved in the mechanical stream.

reviews.review_heading: The college infrastructure is good and the facilities are the best.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available in my college for my course are very easy to understand and per month student have to complete their project every week. The quality of facilities available in this college hostel is very good. In mess, they provide every type of food like veg and non-veg.

reviews.review_heading: Review of P.A. College of Engineering and Technology (PACET).
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good and eco-friendly. It is surrounded by trees. Classrooms are good. Labs are helpful to us. The library is good in our college. The quality of the hostel is good. They serve only vegetarian food in our hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied beacuse of placement.
reviews.review_text:
The college is nice one such a beautiful grounds nature. The person will enjoy 
The hostel is also nice but food is like average and rooms are good. Cleaned rooms very nice and the workers will come everyday to clean your rooms. Food you have to adjust beacuse it's like average.

reviews.review_heading: It is a true review of one student from the college.
reviews.review_text: Wifi is available but is not sufficient for students it was really bad as it only work for some time. Library is really good and also they have foreign author books available. Medical facilities are always available at any instance of time. Sports are really good in our zone my college is the overall champions for several years in athletics. The quality of the system in my college is bad. Hostel is very bad. There are no words about hostel food as its quality is the worst.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Government Engineering College, Modasa is a good choice for the best educational.

review_content.Placements: Our faculty members try their best for placements. They organise placement fairs for students. Students get placement opportunities from small-scale companies that are located in Ahmedabad and Modasa. So, don't think about higher packages. However, placements in Aravalli are good enough.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is best for studies. The college offers NAMO Wi-Fi which is given by the government. Wi-Fi connectivity is the best in all the departments. There are no data limit rules here. Classrooms are huge, and we have a hall for all departments to conduct an event or small functions. The college also organises sports and games week in February.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, it's a good college, but education here is not up to the mark like in Nirma, DDIT, etc.

review_content.Placements: I'm currently in 1st-year of B.E (computer engineering department). The highest salary packages are offered to the students of the computer engineering branch. Almost 40-60% of the students get placed through on-campus or off-campus placement drives. There are very fewer chances to get an internship here. Our seniors who got placed were offered a maximum salary package of 6-7 LPA. The placement cell of the college is not very active. However, professors would help you if you have good contacts with them. The average salary package offered is 2.50 LPA. Most of the companies visiting GEC Modasa are local state-level companies. To get a job in an MNC, you have to really work hard on your own because the college will not provide any assistance.

answer.text: The average BTech CSE salary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. overview_faqs.question: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?
overview_faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Totally dissatisfied with the college.

content.Placements: Our college provides placements for the students of mechanical engineering in companies like AGL and local small-scale industries, especially in Modasa. They offer a salary package of approximately Rs. 6,000 to Rs. 7,000 per month. Other than that, our college provides no other placements. Students here won't be dependent on faculty members, and they will study on their own.
content.Infrastructure: The whole campus is Wi-Fi enabled. All kinds of labs are available, but only for demonstrations as no single machine can work. Our college doesn't provide medical facilities in case of emergency. Sports and games events are organised in our college but for a few students only.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: The college is normal; there is nothing fancy about it, but it is good.

content.Placements: Placements in our college were not good. Our college provides poor placements. Some companies visit our college for the placements of students.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very good. Wi-Fi facility is available, but it is secure with a password. The classrooms are good. reviews.review_text: Our college was constructed in 1983. The campus has 7 departmental blocks. Hostel, labs, canteen and a library are available in the college. All the facilities are provided in the college. The renovation is done very well.

reviews.review_heading: The review of Government Engineering College, Modasa.
reviews.review_text: Our college was constructed in the year 1983. The principal of our college has an experience of more than 30 years, and he knows everything about the engineering field, and he also come to our class to teach. Both practical and theoretical knowledge is provided to students. We have many experienced faculty members in our college.

reviews.review_heading: I'm happy with my college. If someone wants to come here, then it is a right decision.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is excellent as it is designed by great engineers. It is constructed in a scientific view. The whole campus is enabled with Wi-Fi facility. Classrooms are wide and air-conditioned. There are lots of reference books as well as syllabus books available in the library.

reviews.review_heading: If you can take admission in this college than become fearless because it's the best chose for you.
reviews.review_text: As far as the infrastructure is concerned, there is the nothing to worry about. We have very well facilities in our college. This is the largest campus as compared to all other government engineering college. We have a playground of cricket, badminton, football. And also parking facility are allotted to all branch.

reviews.review_heading: I'm dissatisfied with the faculty and placements.
reviews.review_text: The college provides the Wi-Fi facility. There are very good labs and classrooms. The library is good, but it provides the books of older editions. Some good faculty members provide new books to students. The college doesn't even provide any medical facilities. The overall infrastructure is above average.

reviews.review_heading: I got a wonderful experience at this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is beautiful because there is no much crowd. The building is not too tall and is far away from everything. One beautiful fountain is located exactly in front of the entrance to our college gate, and its design looks like a fountain in Singapore. The campus is surrounded by greenery. Overall, the infrastructure is good.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good for hardworking students and tough for lazy students.
reviews.review_text: Gujarat government is spending a good amount on maintaining the infrastructure. Meanwhile, there is a new infrastructure for CE/IT students, while the old buildings like civil and mechanical are restoring with new infrastructure. All the buildings of the college have a good internet connection, but the students have free internet facility only in CE/IT building.

reviews.review_heading: Really that is amazing teaching faculty.
reviews.review_text:
That is amazing campus and gymkhana and facilities are very good 
They teach very good that we can understand 
Labs and Wi-Fi are also present 
Sports is awesome and that ground is also big that you can play many more ganes you should play 
Library also have many books.

reviews.review_heading: A very good College with clean and pleasant surrounding.
reviews.review_text: The campus is very good and designed to the best comfort consideration for study. There are classrooms labs canteen staff rooms and tutorial rooms. College is having free Wi-Fi facility for student to explorer line content of their course. Classrooms & labs are very good with well maintanence. Hostel is also near the college with good facilities.

faqs.answer: Sri Ramakrishna College of Engineering has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu. Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate. Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply. Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced. Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile. Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Our college provides good placements.

review_content.Placements: Placements are good in this college. Around 70-80% of students get placed. The highest salary package offered is 9 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 2.5 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Global Logic, Atos System, TCS, Cognizant, Wipro, Zensar, Birlasoft, Capgemini, Jade Global, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good. There are many sports activities in our college.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty members are good, and they are very supportive. They are very interactive with students. Semester exams are also difficult but students can score good marks if they study properly.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is good in academics with well-qualified faculty and good placements every year.

review_content.Placements: About 60-70% of the students get placed every year. The average salary package offered is 4.5 LPA, and the highest salary package offered ranges from 7-8 LPA. The lowest salary package offered ranges from 3-4 LPA. Top recruiting companies like TCS, Infosys, eInfochips, Amazon, Vedantu, Byju's, etc., visit our college for placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and facilities in our department are better. The availability of labs, classrooms and a library is in a proper way for every particular subject. Particular labs are available, and there is not like 2 or 3 practicals are going in one lab at the same period of time. Quality and quantity of the food are served to the students in the proper environment. Good medical facilities are available. A variety of sports and games are also available here.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: I am dissatisfied with faculty members.

review_content.Placements: All branches have a very poor placement record except for CSE, but that not mean if you take CSE, you will get placed. The CSE department has average placements where the highest salary package varies from 1.5 LPA to 3 LPA. Companies that came to our campus are Zensar and HCL. On the other hand, internship opportunities here are very poor. You have to make efforts on your own for internships and off-campus placements.

review_summary.college_name: Rajiv Gandhi College of Engineering & Research Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is a perfect college for pursuing engineering.

content.Placements: Around 80% of students were placed in my college in 2022. I myself was placed in a total of six MNCs. Top roles offered were software developer, analyst, and executive. The highest salary package in my college offered was 10 LPA at that time for an entry-level job. It was a blast during placements.
content.Infrastructure: Our college had all the required infrastructure. There were libraries and separate bookshelves for all departments. Labs were equipped with recent appliances. There was a cool canteen, and sports culture group used to conduct various games. Anyone with a non-sports background could also participate.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Our college is good.

content.Placements: I got placed at Infosys with a salary package of 9.5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: In our college, the canteen food was good.
content.Faculty: In our college, teaching was good.
content.Other: Our college conducted extracurricular activities. They provided scholarships. Our college events were so good, we enjoyed every moment. I recommend going to this college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides good placements.

content.Placements: Placements are good in this college. Around 70-80% of students get placed. The highest salary package offered is 9 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 2.5 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Global Logic, Atos System, TCS, Cognizant, Wipro, Zensar, Birlasoft, Capgemini, Jade Global, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good. There are many sports activities in our college.
content.Faculty: Faculty members are good, and they are very supportive. They are very interactive with students. Semester exams are also difficult but students can score good marks if they study properly.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Our college is good in academics with well-qualified faculty and good placements every year.

content.Placements: About 60-70% of the students get placed every year. The average salary package offered is 4.5 LPA, and the highest salary package offered ranges from 7-8 LPA. The lowest salary package offered ranges from 3-4 LPA. Top recruiting companies like TCS, Infosys, eInfochips, Amazon, Vedantu, Byju's, etc., visit our college for placements.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and facilities in our department are better. The availability of labs, classrooms and a library is in a proper way for every particular subject. Particular labs are available, and there is not like 2 or 3 practicals are going in one lab at the same period of time. Quality and quantity of the food are served to the students in the proper environment. Good medical facilities are available. A variety of sports and games are also available here.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I am dissatisfied with faculty members.

content.Placements: All branches have a very poor placement record except for CSE, but that not mean if you take CSE, you will get placed. The CSE department has average placements where the highest salary package varies from 1.5 LPA to 3 LPA. Companies that came to our campus are Zensar and HCL. On the other hand, internship opportunities here are very poor. You have to make efforts on your own for internships and off-campus placements.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is average and not that good. Many sports are not organised here. Most of the students play football and cricket. Our college hostels are average. There are no Wi-Fi facilities for students. The library is decent, and enough books are available here. Overall, it is an average tier-3 college.

reviews.review_heading: It is a perfect college for pursuing engineering.
reviews.review_text: Our college had all the required infrastructure. There were libraries and separate bookshelves for all departments. Labs were equipped with recent appliances. There was a cool canteen, and sports culture group used to conduct various games. Anyone with a non-sports background could also participate.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good.
reviews.review_text: In our college, the canteen food was good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. There are many sports activities in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good in academics with well-qualified faculty and good placements every year.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities in our department are better. The availability of labs, classrooms and a library is in a proper way for every particular subject. Particular labs are available, and there is not like 2 or 3 practicals are going in one lab at the same period of time. Quality and quantity of the food are served to the students in the proper environment. Good medical facilities are available. A variety of sports and games are also available here.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is average and not that good. Many sports are not organised here. Most of the students play football and cricket. Our college hostels are average. There are no Wi-Fi facilities for students. The library is decent, and enough books are available here. Overall, it is an average tier-3 college.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, students of 2017 batch had a good experience, decent placements and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: There were a good computer lab, sports facilities and a library for us. Hostels were very clean and well maintained, but there were no air-conditioners in classrooms during our tenure. The internet facility was provided by our college, and its speed was fast. Hostel rooms had air-conditioners and other facilities like cool water and cleaning. I heard that the food served in the hostel was not good. Our college building looks good from the outside, and the playground was also good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities at Rajiv Gandhi College Engineering and Research Nagpur are very good. Each department consists of their high-speed Wi-Fi. We also have neat and clean classrooms, libraries and labs. Quality of facilities in the hostel is very good. Canteen is neat and clean.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is an average college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. There is a shop on the campus, where students take a print out of their lab records. Library and classrooms are good. We had to face certain issues here. The college does not provide enough space in the ground to play sports like cricket.

reviews.review_heading: Think twice before you go.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is average and we use to have a different department on different floors. Wi-Fi, classroom, labs are good. Not sure about the hostel but canteen is good with Average food quality. We had different grounds to play different sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: Good college but need to do some changes.
reviews.review_text: Campus to be rated as 7/10. Infrastructure was good with new technology but there were some old PC's. Library is very big with a large variety of books to read. Wi-Fi facility was available in the campus but with limited data. Cleanliness and disciplined was maintained in the college.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college under Nagpur University.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility was also provided. Labs were fully equipped. Classrooms were also good with projectors. The library is full of all the required books which are needed for students. Many books other than course books were also available. Canteen facilities were at its best at a reasonable rate.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied because of faculty and way poor placements in 2019.
reviews.review_text:
1. Classrooms are clean, the library is clean and has a big reading room, labs are not that advanced as it should be. 
2. Boys hostel was not that good enough, the quality of food was just bearable, no sports was promoted, students had to take their own initiative to organize sports activities no support from management and faculty members.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college because teachers lack Knowledge, but the infrastructure is quite good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college was good. A water cooler was provided, and Wi-Fi service was also available. The library on the campus was good. Hostel facilities were average as rooms are very small and they try to put at least 3students in a small room. The mess was average as compared to other messes, and the college canteen was also average, and it charges high prices. Sports are held during annual fest like our college has annual fest named Malhar.

reviews.review_heading: Very few good teachers are present in the college, and many departments are closed now.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good enough, which can be rated as 8 out off 10. Wi-Fi is provided on campus, but with a limited amount of data is given to students every day. Labs provided by the department are very good with each student having a computer to operate.

reviews.review_heading: Raising Future Stars For Modifying India.
reviews.review_text: Education is the most important parameter for the growth in the development of country as well as in students life. In The modern era we GOT many facilities and infrastructure. Proper Computer Labs, Jio Wi-Fi, Online Study material and many more. Not best but good facilities provided in hostel mess and in sports and games.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Chemical Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I recommend joining BE chemical because of good faculty, environment and infrastructure.

content.Placements: I am a chemical student. Before corona, many chemical students got placed on campus. After corona, only a few students are getting placed in campus interviews. Many seniors got placed on campus. In other branches, many students get high packages.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and atmosphere are very good. All the college buildings are well maintained and clean and new. Our course is of 4 years, where semester 8 is totally for industrial training. Many functions are organized by different departments.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college for engineering students, and it is value for money.

Roles like software developer and project manager are offered to the students. The highest salary package offered in our course was 6 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered was 2.5 LPA. About 50% of students from our batch got an internship at the college.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Our college provides facilities like a cafeteria, hygienic canteen, laboratory, and hospital. It has a very clean and fully hygienic hostel. Our college provides sports grounds to play cricket, volleyball, etc. It has a programming lab, OS lab, and seminar hall so that students can justify their work and practical sessions.

reviews.review_heading: I recommend joining BE chemical because of good faculty, environment and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and atmosphere are very good. All the college buildings are well maintained and clean and new. Our course is of 4 years, where semester 8 is totally for industrial training. Many functions are organized by different departments.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for engineering students, and it is value for money.
reviews.review_text: The campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Our college provides facilities like a cafeteria, hygienic canteen, laboratory, and hospital. It has a very clean and fully hygienic hostel. Our college provides sports grounds to play cricket, volleyball, etc. It has a programming lab, OS lab, and seminar hall so that students can justify their work and practical sessions.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied, anyone can take admission here.
reviews.review_text:
College having Wi-Fi facility, different labs, library, seminar halls etc. A good hygienic canteen impresses more students and faculty members. 
College has big cricket ground, volleyball court, and indoor game place. Also college has large medical facilities. Here students can be treated when they injured.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure of our college is very good.
reviews.review_text: The college does not provide the Wi-Fi facility. There are many classrooms. The college conducts lab sessions weekly, but some machines are not working properly. The college provides a huge library and average canteen for students.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college for pursuing degree.
reviews.review_text: The college provides only girl hostel, and boys are staying in PG. Labs are good. There is a good library which is open in working hours. Wi-Fi facility is available. Good computer facilities are also available. The college also provides projector facility. All equipment is available in the lab.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with my college experience.
reviews.review_text: The campus is Wi-Fi enabled. There are all kinds of labs for my course. I am not a part of the hostel, so I can't describe it. A huge library is available, with all kinds of books for free of cost. There is a hospital available on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure, facilities, and environment for studying are good. Satisfied with faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Hostels and labs were good with Wi-Fi. The campus had Wi-Fi as well. Hostel food quality was better in comparison. The canteen was near the building, which made it comfortable to eat there, but it was slightly more expensive than meals we could eat outside. It was a good experience.

faqs.answer: A:    Gramin College of Engineering has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate who have passed Diploma in Engineering & Technology & obtained at least 45% marks (40% marks for Backward class, EWS & PWD candidates belonging to Maharashtra State only) can also apply.

reviews_list.review_title: There are all the facilities a student wants in any college.

review_content.Placements: All courses are available in the college placements, so many company placements come in college; a maximum of 80 percent of students intern in many companies, such as Tata Motors Private Limited, Aditya Group of Construction Private Limited, or any other of the many companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The quality of our hostel is better. There are better facilities like Wi-Fi, a playground, 24 hours of electricity, laundry, and 24 hours of water. The quality of our mess is the best in the canteen. Facilities are available, and the most important rules and regulations of our hostel are very strict.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is good that provides good placements and infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Around 60% of students get placed at companies like TCS. The role offered is a manager. The average salary package offered is 1.5 LPA and the highest salary package offered is 4 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities in our college are not good.
review_content.Faculty: Sometimes, teachers are helpful in our college. The course curriculum makes students industry-ready. Semester exams are difficult. The pass percentage is below 20%.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: It is an excellent college.

review_content.Placements: Our college has excellent placements. The highest salary package offered was 3.8 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered was 2.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Tata, Mahindra, ITC, Hyundai, Honda, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. There are computer laboratories, chemical laboratories, and physics laboratories. Hostel facilities are not good. Hostel rooms are not good. Our hostel buildings are not good. The hostel does not provide food.
review_content.Faculty: Our teachers are helpful, well-qualified, and supportive. The teaching quality is good.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Needs better infrastructure and placement opportunities.

review_content.Placements: In our BBA department I do not see many students getting placed directly from college. However I hear that a few companies visit the campus for placement drives. Most students prefer to pursue higher studies like an MBA instead of taking up a job. Some internship opportunities are provided but not for all students. Overall placement support is average and can be improved.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college campus is quite small compared to other institutions so there is limited space for activities. Classrooms are basic and not very modern. There is a library but it has limited books related to our course. WiFi is available but not very strong in all areas. Since the campus is small there are fewer facilities for sports and other activities. Hostel and canteen facilities can also be improved.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Needs better infrastructure and placement opportunities.

content.Placements: In our BBA department I do not see many students getting placed directly from college. However I hear that a few companies visit the campus for placement drives. Most students prefer to pursue higher studies like an MBA instead of taking up a job. Some internship opportunities are provided but not for all students. Overall placement support is average and can be improved.
content.Infrastructure: The college campus is quite small compared to other institutions so there is limited space for activities. Classrooms are basic and not very modern. There is a library but it has limited books related to our course. WiFi is available but not very strong in all areas. Since the campus is small there are fewer facilities for sports and other activities. Hostel and canteen facilities can also be improved.

reviews_list.review_title: A review of K.L.N College of Information Technology.

review_content.Placements: There were no placements, and the college brings more BPO companies rather than core companies for the civil department. Most of the civil engineering students are unemployed and still searching for jobs. There is no proper placement training for the students.
review_content.Infrastructure: About infrastructure, we can say directly that it is poor, but it is good enough for the students because of the peaceful environment on the campus to study. There is no proper sweeping and maintenance around the college. There is no possibility of strangers entering the college without permission at the entrance.

reviews_list.review_title: Mini school and placement is zero.

But they collect 5000 for training and placement fees every year from all the students (they won't give any receipt to students).
review_content.Infrastructure: 5 buildings are there at my college. ECE block and management blocks are somewhat good other than all blocks remaining could be the worst. Canteen is good but foods are worst. Lab doesn't have enough equipments. Other fees will be there. Hostel is somewhat good.

review_summary.college_name: K.L.N College of Information Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is the best engineering college in Madurai.

content.Placements: Around 90% of students got placed in my batch. The top recruiting companies are Tata, HCL, TCCL, Wipro etc. Students get internships too. The course is information technology, and they hire students as programmers, developers, and programming installers. The top roles offered in my course are app development, website development etc.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms and labs are available. The infrastructure is the best. Around 300 students can go to the lab at a time. Wi-Fi is unlimited, with 40mbps. Each classroom's capacity is 100 students. The canteen is clean and offers the best quality food. Hygiene is maintained. The canteen foods are very spicy and tasty. Medical facilities are very good. Sports and games are very good. The college motivates students in sports.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: The best laboratory facilities and hospitalities.

content.Placements: In civil engineering there is no campus interview in this college. But in other course nearly 20% students were placed and they offering the students 20k salary per month. The minimum salary given by the company is 12k per month. Placement for CES and IT is good.
content.Infrastructure: In this college, lab facilities are very good. They maintain every lab perfectly for civil engineering. The facility is the best one as compared to other college. Hostel facilities are also good. Tv room, dining hall is clear and the food offered by the mess is also good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: A review of K.L.N College of Information Technology.

content.Placements: There were no placements, and the college brings more BPO companies rather than core companies for the civil department. Most of the civil engineering students are unemployed and still searching for jobs. There is no proper placement training for the students.
content.Infrastructure: About infrastructure, we can say directly that it is poor, but it is good enough for the students because of the peaceful environment on the campus to study. There is no proper sweeping and maintenance around the college. There is no possibility of strangers entering the college without permission at the entrance.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: Mini school and placement is zero.

content.Placements: Worstest in placements. My batch consists of around 500 students. Maximum 20 students can be recruited by very good for good destination. Others are placed in BPOs and call centers. Around 3/4 of the student doesn't place in any company (Inclusive of me). But they collect 5000 for training and placement fees every year from all the students (they won't give any receipt to students).
content.Infrastructure: 5 buildings are there at my college. ECE block and management blocks are somewhat good other than all blocks remaining could be the worst. Canteen is good but foods are worst. Lab doesn't have enough equipments. Other fees will be there. Hostel is somewhat good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the college.

content.Placements: Low scale of placements for our batch than seniors. Only 10 percent of students in every class got placed. Average salary is around 10,000 to 15,000 per month. Maximum got placed for supportive roles in BPO jobs. No one got internship during college.
content.Infrastructure: Moderate infrastructure, Wi-Fi facility is good in college, good spacial classrooms, all sports equipments are available in sports room and gym for both boys and girls. Good quality of food is available in canteen with space of 200 people can sit at same time.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: Moderate infrastructure, Wi-Fi facility is good in college, good spacial classrooms, all sports equipments are available in sports room and gym for both boys and girls. Good quality of food is available in canteen with space of 200 people can sit at same time.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfaction because of placement drive.
reviews.review_text: Moderate infrastructure, Wi-Fi facility is good in college, good special classrooms, all sports equipments are available in sports room and gym for both boys and girls. Good quality of food is available in canteen with space of 200 people can sit at same time.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfaction for college system.
reviews.review_text: Digital library and department have separate libraries with foreign author and local author books. Less important to sports, quality of food is okay in canteen but for hostelers is poor compared to canteen food, less variety of food.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfaction of knowledge and money.
reviews.review_text: Yes, best quality Laboratory and classrooms and peaceful environment each department have separate buildings and Laboratory. Good food provide in campus for both hostelers and day scholars. In hostel room with single room and up to 3 sharing and separate floors.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: We have 24*7 Wi-Fi facility in college campus and hostel and 24*7 dispensary facility in our college. my college fully supports for sports activities and we got more prizes in zonal level and state level competitions. best infrastructure in Madurai.

reviews.review_heading: I wasted my college life by selecting this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is okay. It is not the best but Wi-Fi facility was established when I was in the final year; apart from that, the rest is okay. The hostel has normal food which is also not too good.

reviews.review_heading: The college was good. But the stuff given to the students must be improved.
reviews.review_text: The labs, classrooms and library was well maintained. We had many references and many equipments to handle and learn over real time apart from portions covered from syllabus. Timely remedies and good medical resources were available during emergency. All classrooms were well ventilated and projector was installed in all classrooms. The classrooms were spacious enough to accommodate about 70 students. We had a good quality of food and also the price was low. We were encouraged to participate in m...

reviews.review_heading: The lab facilities are good and satisfied with faculty. I love my college life.
reviews.review_text: The lab facilities, classrooms, and library are excellent in our college. The medical dispensary is available in our college. The quality of our labs is entirely excellent. The canteen food tastes good. The hostel rooms are good and well-maintained. I haven't faced any infrastructure issues.

reviews.review_heading: Facilities, Infrastructure are better but placements are the worst.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is explicitly good. Campus is clean. Laboratories are highly equipped with more no of equipments. Maintenance in both labs and classrooms are good. For medical facilities there is a dispensary. Hostel and Canteen are satisfactory. And the food quality is good.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because of faculty, good infrastructure and facilities etc.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure was good in our college. The college was enough inside from the main road. Peaceful environment. Wi-Fi all over the college. In case of helath problem there was a dispensary inside the college. If it is more serious ambulance was always there to take the student to nearby hospital. Canteen was too good. Enormous space. All kind of food were available at low cost.

reviews.review_heading: My day-to-day lifestyle in the college.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi facility. The library books are not updated. The latest books are not available in the library. Mobile phones are banned in our college. They should improve the quality of projector in the classroom because the view of the screen is not clear. The canteen food is not proper, but they collect more money from the students. By eating canteen food, some students got stomach pain and other problems.

content.Placements: More than 80% of students get placed yearly. The highest package is 21 LPA. The lowest package is 3.5 LPA. In our college, the average placement percentage is 98.7%. The salary package offered is around 3.8 LPA to 8.50 LPA. It is wonderful for students studying in this course.
content.Faculty: In this department, we have a lot of staff who explain very clearly. Their training refers to programs, policies, procedures, and provisions designed to equip (prospective) with the knowledge, attitude, behaviour, approach, methodologies, and skills. Semester exams are typically used in high schools and universities. The semester system helps students build confidence and responsibility. It gives students more opportunities to stay up to date with their studies. It helps students broaden their outlook.

reviews_list.review_title: A college in which students decide the vibe.

review_content.Placements: During recent years, about 20% of students have scored a GPA of above 7.5. So the placements for them are pretty easy. But the students below that certain GPA have to submit extra work worthy of their skills to placements. The highest package is about Rs 1,50,000 per month, and the lowest is Rs 65,000 per month. The average salary is Rs 1,00,000 per month. Most of them are from the company that is operating near the college, ZOHO and some of them are from the Technopark. So about 60% of students got placements by Zoho and other fields.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Average college for average students.

review_content.Placements: The percentage of students who got placed in the last batch is 50 percent. The main companies that are recruiting are ZOHO and many other IT companies. The highest package that has arrived is 45-50k. There are a lot of online and offline internships available for this course.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has an average infrastructure with Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms that are also average. The college doesn't own its own hostel, but there are hostels for students. The food in the canteen is above average, and the mess food is average. The sports and games activities of the college are average.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: You can definitely choose this college.

review_content.Placements: Our class has a total of 60 students. Placements are very few here; our previous batch only placed a few students. In our batch, aptitude tests are being conducted. No placements still. UST company has conducted an aptitude test for our batch; results will be declared soon. The college is trying its best to provide good placement assistance for us, like training us for aptitude tests, training for programming languages, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are high-speed Wi-Fi services all over the campus and also the campus hostel. Specialized laboratories catering to the needs of specific courses are provided. Classrooms are well-ventilated and spacious; also, library facilities are available on campus.

individual_reviews.title: A college in which students decide the vibe.

content.Placements: During recent years, about 20% of students have scored a GPA of above 7.5. So the placements for them are pretty easy. But the students below that certain GPA have to submit extra work worthy of their skills to placements. The highest package is about Rs 1,50,000 per month, and the lowest is Rs 65,000 per month. The average salary is Rs 1,00,000 per month. Most of them are from the company that is operating near the college, ZOHO and some of them are from the Technopark. So about 60% of students got placements by Zoho and other fields.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Average college for average students.

content.Placements: The percentage of students who got placed in the last batch is 50 percent. The main companies that are recruiting are ZOHO and many other IT companies. The highest package that has arrived is 45-50k. There are a lot of online and offline internships available for this course.
content.Infrastructure: The college has an average infrastructure with Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms that are also average. The college doesn't own its own hostel, but there are hostels for students. The food in the canteen is above average, and the mess food is average. The sports and games activities of the college are average.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: You can definitely choose this college.

content.Placements: Our class has a total of 60 students. Placements are very few here; our previous batch only placed a few students. In our batch, aptitude tests are being conducted. No placements still. UST company has conducted an aptitude test for our batch; results will be declared soon. The college is trying its best to provide good placement assistance for us, like training us for aptitude tests, training for programming languages, etc.
content.Infrastructure: There are high-speed Wi-Fi services all over the campus and also the campus hostel. Specialized laboratories catering to the needs of specific courses are provided. Classrooms are well-ventilated and spacious; also, library facilities are available on campus.
