hostel_campus.college_name: College of Engineering

reviews.review_heading: A good college with CS engineering.
reviews.review_text: Good college with decent infrastructure. It has good canteen. Mess and hostel facilities are within walking distance. Transportation facilities (college bus) are available from Kottarakkara KSRTC bus stand. The mess facility is good and hostels are nice as well. The college has proper lab facilities and a well-maintained library.

reviews.review_heading: The last ranking college.
reviews.review_text: We are provided with a bedroom for 2 people with an attached bathroom. The food is something you can expect from any other hostel food. The breakfast and dinner are not bad but the lunch is unbearable. The registration is trained with a monthly fee of Rs. 6,000.

reviews.review_heading: A college in which students decide the vibe.
reviews.review_text: The facilities for the core subject like computer science are very good. But for other subjects for 1st year like Physics, Chemistry, and Electronics are below average. The SDPK hall (seminar hall) is the main feature of the college. It is well-cleaned and has air-conditioning with sufficient laptops. Wi-Fi is available but it is slow. Classrooms and toilets are very tidy. The canteen provides great food for the faculty members and students. But they usually run out pretty soon. There is a groun...

reviews.review_heading: Average college for average students.
reviews.review_text: The college has an average infrastructure with Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms that are also average. The college doesn't own its own hostel, but there are hostels for students. The food in the canteen is above average, and the mess food is average. The sports and games activities of the college are average.

reviews.review_heading: You can definitely choose this college.
reviews.review_text: There are high-speed Wi-Fi services all over the campus and also the campus hostel. Specialized laboratories catering to the needs of specific courses are provided. Classrooms are well-ventilated and spacious; also, library facilities are available on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Good people, average infrastructure, and good vibes.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not of the highest quality. It is an old college with a limited budget so it has its limitations. The computer lab is decent and other labs are okay; all equipment works as intended. The college does not provide a hostel but it has arranged private hostels nearby, which are average.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good place for studies, harmony, and friendship.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good. The college offers a good atmosphere to study. The food served in the canteen and hostel is acceptable. Hostel rooms are good. The gym facility is not good. Wi-Fi facility is available here. The library is good. The sports club is very efficient.

reviews.review_heading: Government affiliated ihrd college with good ambience.
reviews.review_text: College atmosphere and campus are good. Almost 30 acres of college campus. 2 blocks and many other lab facilities are there. Lab facilities includes electrical lab, mechanical lab, and computer lab. Multi storied building with smart class room facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Depends on your attitude. Your college life here depends on your readiness to make it better.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not so great. We got big buildings but the labs need to be improved. We need a good library. We don't get time for sports during college hours. The Wi-Fi can only be used by students under emergency conditions. Overall college need good improvement. There is no college hostel for boys in first year.

reviews.review_heading: Teachers are good but the building is old.
reviews.review_text: The college teachers are very friendly and very welcoming of doubts however the college is a bit old so infrastructure is also old but everything is mostly in usable condition and they have arranged most of our facilities for our lab activities and all.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with a good environment. Absolutely satisfied.
reviews.review_text: The college provides a good amount of new technological classrooms. Labs provided are also good with good systems to practice on. The college provides a well-maintained hostel for both male and female students. Good food is offered for students in the mess. Wi-Fi connection is provided for students. Hostel wardens are friendly too, and they always take a look at the needs of the students if they need any.

reviews.review_heading: It is a beautiful college if we are willing to live our college life a little.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and quality are above average, but the quantity is lower in the case of computers in labs, compared to other colleges. Every classroom has projectors, so faculty members often use them to show us presentations. The qualities of the hostel are average. I am not staying in the hostel, but I have heard from friends talking about it.

reviews.review_heading: Good college, almost everything is good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure for our course is quite good. Classrooms are spacious and well-ventilated, equipped with projectors and whiteboards. Wi-Fi is available throughout the academic block, and the lab facilities are decent with necessary equipment and software, though some systems could be better maintained. The library is well-stocked with relevant books and journals and provides a quiet space for studying.

review_content.Placements: I'll give here 3 star rating because the placement here is not up to the mark. Sure all the MNCs come to take students but a very few of the students gets placed. The placement in other courses than engineering is good enough. The curriculum is updated and includes all the recent developments in every field. The vocational courses make you well versed for your job. The teachers are very friendly and supportive. A majority of the teachers in our college have a masters degree in their field of knowledge.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is almost no campus life in this university as to say, not saying we don't enjoy it at all but we don't conduct any fests or other cultural events. The university is almost standing alone outside the main city so. The college is a restriction to one's growth. One cannot expect to learn anything from this institution. Personally I was very disheartened after I joined St. Bede's. It instead of giving opportunities for my growth, took them away from me.

faqs.question: Q: Which courses does Ultra College of Engineering and Technology for Women offer to students?

faqs.answer: Ultra College of Engineering and Technology for Women has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu. Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate. Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply. Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced. Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile. Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.

faqs.question: How can I get into Ultra College of Engineering and Technology for Women for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
Ultra College of Engineering and Technology for Women has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu.
Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate.
Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply.
Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced.
Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years a

college_info.college_name: Shriram College of Engineering and Management, ShriRam Group of Colleges: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Placements, Reviews

highlights.summary: Here are some additional updates regarding the Shriram College of Engineering and Management, ShriRam Group of Colleges:

placements.overview: Founded in 2008, Shriram College of Engineering and Management, ShriRam Group of Colleges is a private institute. It is located in Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh. The institute is accredited with AICTE. Shriram College of Engineering and Management, ShriRam Group of Colleges provides UG and PG courses in Full Time mode. It provides 11 courses across specialisations such as Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering and VLSI Design. Some of the courses offered at this institute include B.E. / B.Tech and M.E./M.Tech. Shriram College of Engineering and Management, ShriRam Group of Colleges fees ranges between INR 1,21,500 to 1,82,400. The student intake for these courses is 432. Shriram College of Engineering and Management, ShriRam Group of Colleges offers these course across fields such as Engineering. The median salary offered to students is INR 3,00,000. Shriram College of Engineering and Management, ShriRam Group of Colleges offers all the campus facilities to students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Actual good review about engineering college.

review_content.Placements: About 50% of students get placed in our course. The highest salary package offered is 8 LPA and the lowest salary package offered is 2 LPA. The average salary package offered is 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies like TCS, Infosys, Tech Mahindra, etc., visit the college for placements. Only 2% of students got internships. The top roles offered are software developer, java developer, and web developer.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are good with no Wi-Fi, computer labs, classrooms, and a library with all course books. I don't know about hostel facilities, but my friends told me they are good. The good quality of food is available in the mess and canteen. All facilities for sports and games are available.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: All the things on campus are good.

review_content.Placements: The number of students placed in various companies that come to our college is not exactly known to me. The maximum number of students placed is around 80%. The highest salary package offered is 13 LPA and the lowest salary package offered is 3 LPA. Top role offered in my college is manager.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good and we have multiple buildings in my college. Wi-Fi is not good for all students, but the labs and classrooms are well-designed for students. The food quality is good but quite expensive.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are helpful to all students. Most of the teachers completed their graduate and post-graduate degrees in our technology field. It is not at all easy for all students to clear semester exams without studying, so I consider studying to be very important.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Infrastructure is good and faculty is also the best.

review_content.Placements: 70 percent of students are placed in my course from my college. The lowest package is 3 LPA, and the highest is 10 LPA. 40 to 50 percent of students got internships from my course. The recruiting companies are Mantra Labs, Jellyfish, Presenda, and Planet for non-technical.
review_content.Infrastructure: Fully Wi-Fi campus, labs are good, classrooms are also good, and the library is the best; we can study in silence in the library. The quality of food in the mess and canteen is good, medical facilities are also available, and sports and games are available on the college campus.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Campus is beautiful and modest design. The quality of placement is good.

review_content.Placements: Around 70% placements, in companies like anr software, amdocs, nerdy turtlez, shaligram infotech and so on. The highest package is 4 lpa and average Package is 2 lpa. Overall placement process is very good and pleasant. Shriram group of college is very supportive and good placement .
review_content.Infrastructure: In term of infrastructure, SRGOC is one of the best college. The college have classroom with Wi-Fi enabled LCD projectors, tutorial room, library, a state-of-the-art seminar room and a fully equipped auditorium with seating capacity of over 500 persons.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has good infrastructure and faculty members.

review_content.Placements: I passed out in 2018 from the mechanical engineering branch. Only 50% of the students got placed from our branch in the previous year. The lowest salary package offered was 2.4 LPA and the highest salary package offered was 12 LPA. Banmore an electrical work company and Wipro are the most visited companies in our college. The top roles are offered in mechanical engineering teams and HR team. The salary package offered in the mechanical engineering branch varies from 1.8 LPA to 8 LPA. Almost 100% of the students got internship training in HCL Technology.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: The college is small and average, but it is good for mechanical and pharmacy courses.

review_content.Placements: No placements are offered for core branches. The teachers in the mechanical department are good, but the placements are not offered for core branches, especially the mechanical branch. A maximum of the mechanical students got placed in IT companies. ShriRam is a group of colleges, that includes SRCEM, SRIIT and SRCP. The mechanical branch in SRCEM is good. B.Pharma course is also available in SRCP.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is average. Hostel facilities are also available. There are 3 buildings of SRGOC, they are SRCEM (Shri Ram College of Engineering and Management), SRIIT (Shri Ram Institute of Technology), and SRCP (Shri Ram College of Pharmacy). SRCEM is older than SRIIT and SRCP as it was established in 1998.

reviews.review_heading: All the students are placed in different companies.
reviews.review_text: The full name of my college is SRGOC, i.e., Shri Ram Group of Colleges and the management college. There are SRCEM, SRIIT, and SRCP are the three buildings in my college. There is a sports club, garden, Wi-Fi, cafeteria, and canteen are available. The hostel rooms are available, and the infrastructure is good.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college.

highlights.summary: Here are some additional updates regarding the Khandesh College Education Society'S College of Engineering and Management:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Khandesh College Education Society'S College of Engineering and Management offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. Whereas, at PG level, Khandesh College Education Society'S College of Engineering and Management offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA. Khandesh College Education Society'S College of Engineering and Management fee structure for all the courses is around INR 18,000 to 2,20,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Computer Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: That's the best college to complete your UG or PG course.

review_content.Placements: 99% of students are placed in our course, and packages offered range from a minimum of 4 LPA to a maximum of 6 LPA. Companies also come in a good way. Between 50% to 75% of students get internships and placements. Any subject roles can be offered at our college, and they provide very fantastic opportunities.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are good, and the management is also decent. Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms are average, while the PCs are of good quality for the Computer Engineering course, or the same applies to other courses. The hostel, mess, and canteen are average, not very good, and the quality of sports and games is also average.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college with decent infrastructure and a small campus, according to the city.

content.Placements: Placements are good, and according to the college, it's far better. KCE Group aims for high placements with claims of over 70 percent in good IT companies with high packages like 9 LPA. It offers a decent average package, i.e., around 4.7 LPA. Major recruiters like TCS, Infosys, and Wipro hire students. There is a healthy placement environment, but it can vary according to each year and brand.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of my course and college, and facilities like Wi-Fi connection, etc., are good. Labs and classrooms are very well maintained. The library contains all books and everything we need in our college. The quality of food served is awesome in our canteen. Medical facilities are very good. It focuses on sports, games, and extracurricular activities.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The college is good. It changes me.

content.Placements: Khandesh College of Engineering, Jalgaon, is good for students who are aspiring to code. As per my information, it's the second-best engineering college in Jalgaon. Talking about placements, they are not the best, but compared to others, they're great. The average package is around 4 to 5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The college is huge. It includes many sub-branches on the campus. The courses cover all the branches that you know. Talking about the hostel, I don’t stay there, but according to my friends, there are some good hostels in Jalgaon. There are also good people in the hostels who give priority to students.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Indra Ganesan College of Engineering.

review_content.Placements: Around 85-90% of students got placed. The highest salary is 7.2 LPA, the average salary is 3.8 LPA, and the lowest salary is 2.4 LPA. Top recruiters are TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Zoho, and Cognizant. About 75% of students got internships at companies like TCS, Zoho, and startups. Top roles offered are data analyst, AI engineer, software developer, ML engineer, and business analyst.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is enabled on campus. It has smart classrooms, well-equipped AI labs, and digital library access. Hostel rooms are clean. It has 24/7 water and electricity. Mess food is decent and has a variety in the canteen. It has basic medical care with on-campus health support. Facilities for cricket, football, volleyball, and indoor games like carrom and chess are available.

review_summary.college_name: Indra Ganesan College of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Indra Ganesan College of Engineering review.

content.Placements: In my batch (B.E. CSE), around 85% of students are placed. The highest package is ₹7 LPA, the lowest is ₹2.5 LPA, and the average was around ₹4 LPA. Top recruiters included TCS, Wipro, Cognizant, Infosys, and Capgemini. About 60% of students got internships in companies like Zoho, CTS, and startups, with roles such as software developer, QA engineer, and support analyst.
content.Infrastructure: The CSE department had Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms, well-equipped computer labs, and easy access to the central library with e-resources. Hostel rooms are clean with basic amenities, though the food in the mess was average, the canteen offered better variety. A small medical center with a nurse and a doctor on call was available for emergencies. Sports facilities included cricket, volleyball, badminton, and an indoor games room.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good college and placements.

content.Placements: The college has a strong placement cell that provides excellent opportunities for students. Many reputed companies visit the campus, and a majority of students are placed with competitive packages. The training and support for interviews are also well-organized.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities, including the library, computer labs, and sports areas, are modern and well-equipped. The college also encourages innovation and leadership by providing platforms such as clubs, seminars, and competitions.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of Indra Ganesan College of Engineering.

content.Placements: Around 85-90% of students got placed. The highest salary is 7.2 LPA, the average salary is 3.8 LPA, and the lowest salary is 2.4 LPA. Top recruiters are TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Zoho, and Cognizant. About 75% of students got internships at companies like TCS, Zoho, and startups. Top roles offered are data analyst, AI engineer, software developer, ML engineer, and business analyst.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is enabled on campus. It has smart classrooms, well-equipped AI labs, and digital library access. Hostel rooms are clean. It has 24/7 water and electricity. Mess food is decent and has a variety in the canteen. It has basic medical care with on-campus health support. Facilities for cricket, football, volleyball, and indoor games like carrom and chess are available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: Review of Indra Ganesan College of Engineering.

content.Placements: I got placed in JD Software Pvt., Ltd., as a software programmer through on-campus interviews. From my junior batch (2018) of B.Tech, the IT students got placed through on-campus drives. Apart from this, I also got an offer in HCL Technologies as L1- network engineer. During my tenure, I had been served as a Microsoft student partner. The number of companies and placement percentage are gradually increasing every academic year.
content.Infrastructure: The library and labs are well-equipped with proper access for entry. The college provides new modernised bus and students can even get their bike if they have the driving license. The college has an air-conditioned seminar hall. Classrooms and restrooms are well maintained and cleaned at regular intervals. The auditorium is very good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Indra Ganesan College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: The library and labs are well-equipped with proper access for entry. The college provides new modernised bus and students can even get their bike if they have the driving license. The college has an air-conditioned seminar hall. Classrooms and restrooms are well maintained and cleaned at regular intervals. The auditorium is very good.

reviews.review_heading: If you are only concerned about studies, then it is a good college.
reviews.review_text: The college provides good Wi-Fi facility and classrooms. But there is a poor medical facility, and we are not allowed to participate in sports and games. The quality of the food served in the canteen is better, but the laboratory is not well equipped. Even they provide a few types of equipment for testing. Our campus is very small. However, the only good thing is that each floor has a restroom and drinking water facility, and we don't need to travel for one block to another.

reviews.review_heading: Joining this college is really a waste of time.
reviews.review_text: The labs will not have enough systems as well as configuration. Poor maintenance of lab and systems. It is not a well-suited server. They will use a single building for all purposes, but toilets are well-cleaned and hygienic. There were proper in cleaning classrooms. They need a lot more improvements.

reviews.review_heading: If you have to study, engineering don't take this college. There are a lot of colleges in Trichy.
reviews.review_text: In college advertisement, they tell 24 hours Wi-Fi facility and AC labs are available, but we don't have a single fan in our lab it is under the asbestos sheet with demo machines. The classrooms are not bad, sports and games are the worst in our college our management doesn't give importance to sports During our sports day only players allowed to ground others stay in class and write tests. The canteen food is not good, but the price is less. The hostel rooms are in un-hygienic condition.

reviews.review_heading: The worst engineering college in Tiruchi based on the infrastructure, placement, exposure, faculty.
reviews.review_text: There are 2 buildings with the worst infrastructure. The classrooms, lab, and library are bad and damaged. The cardboard separates the classrooms, if we hit, it breaks. The windows are closed by using the fibreglass, so the ventilation is bad. There are no fans, bad drinking water facilities, no machines in the labs, no proper books in the library. A single ground is used for football, cricket, atheletics, bus parking, surveying, functions, programs, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Worst management and staffs. They are not that much knowledgeable person to teach the classes.
reviews.review_text: I am the third batch of my college and the infrastructure of my college is the worst and not even the construction works are complete. No proper room facilities in the hostel and the foods provided in the hostel are very horrible.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements, but the last two years weren't like expected.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms in our college were excellent. We had fresh labs. There were highly appreciated sports faculty members and doctoral facilities. Everyone here feels fresh and good. Students enjoy a lot with these highly appreciated facilities.

reviews.review_heading: The college provides good facilities. It is a good place.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a normal infrastructure. It has smart classrooms. C4i4 lab is launched. It has good facilities for students.

faqs.answer: University College Of Engineering, Dindigul has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu. Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate. Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply. Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced. Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile. Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.

review_summary.college_name: University College Of Engineering, Dindigul Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good campus and studies based on students' interest and hard work.

content.Placements: Placements are average and depend on students' hard work. The average package is INR 4 LPA. Top job roles in the ECE domain include Embedded System Engineer, Instrumentation Engineer, and Electrical Engineer. Students can also join IT sectors.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is average. The department has labs with Wi-Fi, including microprocessor and electronics labs. Hostel and mess facilities are good, while sports and extracurricular activities are average.
content.Faculty: Faculty members are qualified, knowledgeable, and clear doubts when asked. They are friendly, and their approach depends on students' behavior. Pass percentage is around 45%. Exams are easy if students put in effort.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Value for money to get knowledge.

content.Placements: Here placement is poor. No companies are approaching the college. They use the knowledge, but placement is nil. They offer a placement programme, but this is not used. No companies prefer this college. We can try ourselves for the placement. There is no history of placement in this college.
content.Infrastructure: Yes, the college has all the necessary infrastructure, facilities, technologies and facilities provided enough for the students. There is a friendly environment around us. It is a clean NEET campus. The special thing is the green air that exists inside the campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Our college is nice with good infrastructure and basic facilities.

content.Placements: Companies like Infosys, HCL, and Trichy are major recruiting companies. All the students willing for the internship program got internships in the company like Phoenix softech.
content.Infrastructure: There is free internet service in all department blocks and labs. Classrooms have PowerPoint presentations. There are 8 computer labs separately for each department. Labs contain separate computers for every student. There are separate hostels for gents and ladies within the campus. There is a mini hospital with a doctor and nurse 24x7. Sports like cricket and volleyball are practiced and trained by the students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: Details about University College Of Engineering, Dindigul.

content.Placements: In the beginning, not that many placements happened. But now more placements happened in that college, with up to 11 LPA. And some of them got a little less amount. Again, everything is based on their interview performances. Nowadays, it is improved a little from the older days.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel was not good at the starting time of college. But now it is too good. Fully safe. No Wi-Fi connections at college. Infrastructure also looks good. Wardens are also doing their best for the safety of hostel students. They recently constructed a hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty, good placements in 2020.

content.Placements: By the seventh semester, we get eligible for campus interviews. For attending our interview successfully, there are some training classes provided in well-reputed organizations. We expect interviews from Tata, Titan, Infosys, Ola, etc. But there is no placement conducted for students till the end of college.
content.Infrastructure: The college's infrastructure is good. The labs, library, and classrooms are good. Every room is equipped with 2 fans, 2 windows, and four 2-tier cottages. Water and food are provided with good hygiene, and different meals are served on different days. Scholarships for the hostel will be provided. Other than hostels, PG is available outside the campus.
